attributes.description: Detect and inventory Shadow AI tools on macOS endpoints — local LLMs, AI coding agents, AI desktop applications, MCP servers (with config content scanning), AI model files, Python/npm AI packages, browser extensions (Chrome, Firefox, Safari), Docker containers, launchd services, Homebrew packages, GPU-equipped systems, AI API key exposure, and AI tool configuration directories, vector databases, model cache sizes, and SSH tunnels for AI services.
attributes.name: ai-asset-discovery-macos

queries.query:
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'ollama', 'lms', 'gpt4all', 'jan', 'msty', 'local-ai',
    'koboldcpp', 'llama-server', 'llama-cli', 'vllm',
    'mlc_llm', 'mlc_chat', 'anythingllm', 'anything-llm',
    'litellm', 'open-webui', 'llamafile', 'text-generation-launcher',
    'text-generation-router', 'comfyui', 'invokeai'
,
    'msty',
    'exo',
    'tabby')
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm.entrypoints%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-launcher%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama.cpp%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llamafile%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mlc_llm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%localai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%oobabooga%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%stable-diffusion-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%whisper%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%msty%serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%exo%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabby%serve%'
;

SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'claude', 'cursor', 'windsurf', 'warp', 'zed',
    'tabnine', 'TabNine', 'WasmTabNine',
    'codeium_language_server', 'supermaven',
    'amazon-q', 'pieces-os', 'Pieces OS',
    'codex', 'aider', 'sgpt'
,
    'augment',
    'codex',
    'goose',
    'devin',
    'amp')
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic-ai/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude_desktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%com.anthropic.claudedesktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor.app%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor Helper%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Windsurf%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium_language_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%enterprise%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-language-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@openai/codex%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider-chat%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider%--model%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continue.continue%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continuedev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codewhisperer%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%AmazonWebServices.amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabnine%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.warp.Warp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.zed.Zed%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell_gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell-gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%swe-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pieces-os%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supermaven%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%augment%code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openai/codex%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%goose%session%'
;

SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000,
    8501, 6333, 6334, 19530, 8265, 9099, 5678, 8888
)
    AND l.address != '127.0.0.1'
    AND l.address != '::1';

SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000,
    8501, 6333, 6334, 19530, 8265, 9099, 5678, 8888
);

SELECT
    name,
    path,
    bundle_identifier,
    bundle_short_version AS version,
    datetime(last_opened_time, 'unixepoch') AS last_opened_time
FROM apps
WHERE name IN (
    'Ollama', 'LM Studio', 'GPT4All', 'Jan', 'Msty', 'AnythingLLM',
    'ChatGPT', 'Claude', 'Perplexity', 'DeepSeek', 'Poe',
    'Google Gemini', 'Microsoft Copilot',
    'Cursor', 'Windsurf', 'Zed', 'Warp', 'Void',
    'Pieces OS', 'Replit',
    'DiffusionBee', 'Draw Things',
    'Otter', 'Granola', 'Krisp', 'Raycast', 'TypingMind',
    'Notion', 'Craft'
)
    OR bundle_identifier IN (
    'com.openai.chat',
    'com.anthropic.claudedesktop',
    'ai.perplexity.app',
    'com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92', -- Cursor uses todesktop wrapper
    'com.ollama.ollama',
    'com.quora.poe',
    'dev.zed.Zed',
    'dev.warp.Warp-Stable',
    'com.raycast.macos',
    'ai.krisp.krispMac',
    'com.lmstudio.app',
    'com.codeium.windsurf',
    'io.gpt4all.gpt4all',
    'jan.ai',
    'com.diffusionbee.diffusionbee',
    'com.liuliu.draw-things',
    'notion.id',
    'com.lukilabs.lukiapp',
    'com.pieces.os',
    'com.msty.app'
);

SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.cmdline LIKE '%@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-server-%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%fastmcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%smithery%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcpx%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-run%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%glama%mcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-proxy%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-gateway%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supergateway%';

SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE '/Users/%/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude/settings.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cursor/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.mcp.json';

SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama/models/blobs/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.lmstudio/models/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/lm-studio/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/jan/models/%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.onnx'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Downloads/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Downloads/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Downloads/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Downloads/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Downloads/%.onnx'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%.gguf'
)
AND size > 100000000;

SELECT
    name,
    version,
    directory
FROM python_packages
WHERE name IN (
    'torch', 'tensorflow', 'onnxruntime', 'jax', 'flax',
    'transformers', 'diffusers', 'accelerate', 'peft', 'trl',
    'huggingface-hub', 'tokenizers', 'datasets', 'sentence-transformers',
    'safetensors',
    'openai', 'anthropic', 'google-generativeai', 'cohere', 'replicate',
    'groq', 'mistralai', 'together', 'fireworks-ai', 'deepseek-sdk',
    'langchain', 'langchain-core', 'langchain-community',
    'llama-index', 'llama-index-core',
    'autogen', 'crewai', 'semantic-kernel', 'haystack-ai', 'dspy-ai',
    'instructor', 'guidance', 'outlines',
    'llama-cpp-python', 'ollama', 'vllm', 'ctransformers',
    'bitsandbytes', 'auto-gptq', 'exllama',
    'fastmcp', 'mcp',
    'chromadb', 'qdrant-client', 'weaviate-client', 'pinecone-client',
    'pymilvus', 'faiss-cpu', 'faiss-gpu',
    'aider-chat', 'shell-gpt', 'mentat',
    'gradio', 'streamlit',
    'openai-whisper', 'whisper', 'elevenlabs', 'bark',
    'litellm',
    'llm'
);

SELECT
    ce.name,
    ce.identifier,
    ce.version,
    ce.description,
    ce.path,
    u.username
FROM chrome_extensions ce
LEFT JOIN users u ON ce.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    ce.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR ce.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR ce.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

SELECT
    id,
    name,
    image,
    status,
    command,
    started_at
FROM docker_containers
WHERE
    image LIKE '%ollama%' OR image LIKE '%vllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%text-generation%' OR image LIKE '%localai%'
    OR image LIKE '%llama.cpp%' OR image LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR image LIKE '%pytorch%' OR image LIKE '%tensorflow%'
    OR image LIKE '%triton%' OR image LIKE '%huggingface%'
    OR image LIKE '%mcp%' OR image LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    OR image LIKE '%open-webui%' OR image LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%flowise%' OR image LIKE '%langflow%'
    OR image LIKE '%chromadb%' OR image LIKE '%chroma%'
    OR image LIKE '%qdrant%' OR image LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR image LIKE '%milvus%' OR image LIKE '%pinecone%'
    OR image LIKE '%comfyui%' OR image LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
    OR image LIKE '%invokeai%' OR image LIKE '%automatic1111%'
    OR image LIKE '%n8n%' OR image LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR image LIKE '%sweepai%' OR image LIKE '%pr-agent%';

SELECT
    label,
    path,
    program_arguments,
    run_at_load
FROM launchd
WHERE label LIKE '%ollama%' OR label LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR label LIKE '%gpt4all%' OR label LIKE '%jan%'
    OR label LIKE '%anythingllm%' OR label LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR label LIKE '%open-webui%' OR label LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR label LIKE '%comfyui%' OR label LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%mcp-server%';

SELECT
    f.directory,
    f.path,
    f.filename
FROM file f
WHERE (
    f.path LIKE '/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/local/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/local/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/usr/local/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/.nvm/versions/node/%/lib/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/.nvm/versions/node/%/lib/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/.nvm/versions/node/%/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/node_modules/mcp-server-%/package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE '/Users/%/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/%/package.json'
);

SELECT
    cpu_brand AS model,
    cpu_type AS vendor,
    hardware_model,
    physical_memory
FROM system_info
WHERE cpu_brand LIKE '%Apple M%'
    OR hardware_model LIKE '%Mac%'
UNION
SELECT
    model,
    vendor,
    '' AS hardware_model,
    '' AS physical_memory
FROM pci_devices
WHERE
    (vendor LIKE '%NVIDIA%' AND (pci_class = '0300' OR pci_class = '0302'))
    OR (vendor LIKE '%Advanced Micro Devices%' AND pci_class = '0300');

SELECT path, type, datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time, datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE directory LIKE '/Users/%/'
AND (
    (type = 'directory' AND filename IN (
        '.ollama', 'jan', '.continue', '.cursor', '.codeium',
        '.tabnine', '.claude', '.supermaven', '.anythingllm',
        '.invokeai'
    ))
    OR filename = '.aider.conf.yml'
)
UNION
SELECT path, type, datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time, datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE directory LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/'
AND type = 'directory'
AND filename IN (
    'lm-studio', 'huggingface', 'gpt4all', 'llama.cpp'
)
UNION
SELECT path, type, datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time, datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE directory LIKE '/Users/%/.config/'
AND type = 'directory'
AND filename IN (
    'github-copilot', 'shell_gpt'
);

SELECT
    fa.name,
    fa.identifier,
    fa.version,
    fa.description,
    fa.path,
    fa.active,
    u.username
FROM firefox_addons fa
LEFT JOIN users u ON fa.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    fa.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR fa.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR fa.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

SELECT
    se.name,
    se.identifier,
    se.version,
    se.description,
    se.path
FROM safari_extensions se
WHERE
    se.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR se.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR se.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR se.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR se.name LIKE '%Grammarly%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Quillbot%' OR se.name LIKE '%QuillBot%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR se.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Poe%' OR se.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Sider%';

SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.env.local'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Projects/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/projects/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/src/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/code/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/dev/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/repos/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.openai'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.anthropic'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/openai/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/anthropic/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/groq/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/cohere/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama/auth'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/litellm_config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.litellm/config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/shell_gpt/.sgptrc'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.conf.yml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.env'
)
AND size > 0;

SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'jupyter', 'jupyter-lab', 'jupyter-notebook',
    'jupyter-server', 'jupyterhub', 'jupyterhub-singleuser'
)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%notebook%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%lab%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyterhub%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter-notebook%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter_core%'
    OR (p.name = 'python3' AND p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%')
    OR (p.name = 'python' AND p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%')
    OR (p.name = 'Python' AND p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%');

SELECT
    path,
    filename AS extension_id,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot-chat%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/continue.continue%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/codeium.codeium%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/tabnine.tabnine%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/amazonwebservices.amazon-q%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/supermaven.supermaven%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/blackboxapp.blackbox%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/pieces.pieces-vscode%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/phind.phind%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/bito.bito%'
)
AND type = 'directory';

SELECT
    name,
    version,
    path
FROM homebrew_packages
WHERE name IN (
    'ollama', 'llama.cpp', 'llamafile', 'gpt4all',
    'vllm', 'litellm', 'localai',
    'huggingface-cli', 'transformers',
    'pytorch', 'tensorflow',
    'cursor', 'zed', 'warp',
    'aider', 'shell-gpt', 'llm',
    'chromadb', 'qdrant',
    'comfyui', 'whisper', 'whisper-cpp',
    'jupyterlab', 'jupyter'
)
    OR name LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR name LIKE '%llama%'
    OR name LIKE '%whisper%'
    OR name LIKE '%mcp-server%';

SELECT DISTINCT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    pos.remote_address,
    pos.remote_port,
    pos.local_port,
    pos.protocol
FROM process_open_sockets pos
JOIN processes p ON pos.pid = p.pid
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE pos.remote_port IN (443, 80)
    AND pos.state = 'ESTABLISHED'
    AND pos.remote_address NOT IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1', '0.0.0.0', '::')
    AND (
        p.name IN (
            'ollama', 'cursor', 'Cursor', 'Cursor Helper',
            'claude', 'Claude', 'claude-code',
            'copilot-agent', 'copilot',
            'windsurf', 'Windsurf',
            'aider', 'cline', 'codeium',
            'ChatGPT', 'chatgpt'
        )
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openai%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anthropic%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%langchain%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%huggingface%'
    );

SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN ('qdrant', 'milvus', 'weaviate', 'chroma')
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%chromadb%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%qdrant%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%milvus%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pinecone%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pgvector%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%lancedb%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%faiss%';

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.ollama/models%' THEN 'ollama'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/huggingface%' THEN 'huggingface'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/lm-studio%' THEN 'lm-studio'
    END AS ai_tool,
    CASE
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.ollama/models%' THEN '/Users/*/.ollama/models'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/huggingface%' THEN '/Users/*/.cache/huggingface'
        WHEN f.directory LIKE '%/.cache/lm-studio%' THEN '/Users/*/.cache/lm-studio'
    END AS cache_path,
    SUM(f.size) AS total_bytes,
    COUNT(*) AS file_count
FROM file f
WHERE (
    f.directory LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama/models%'
    OR f.directory LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface%'
    OR f.directory LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/lm-studio%'
)
    AND f.type = 'regular'
GROUP BY ai_tool
HAVING total_bytes > 104857600;

SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name = 'ssh'
    AND (
        p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:11434:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:8080:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:8000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:3000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:7860:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:1234:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:8888:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-L%:6333:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:11434:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:8080:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:8000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:3000:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:7860:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:1234:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:8888:%'
        OR p.cmdline LIKE '%-R%:6333:%'
    );
